nasb.text: You go and get straw for yourselves wherever you can find it, but none of your labor will be reduced.’ ”

esv.text: Go and get your straw yourselves wherever you can find it, but your work will not be reduced in the least.’”

cnv.text: 你們自己能在哪裡找到草，就到哪裡去撿吧，但你們的工作一點也不可減少。’”

ccb.text: 你们要自己设法去找，但上交的砖一块也不能少。”
